description:
Increases or decreases the rope length by the given amount. Use relative parameter for changing rope length +/- from current length.
{{Feature|informative|Rope length can be in range 0.5..100 metres.}}
examples: <sqf>ropeUnwind [ropes heli1 select 0, 3, 10]; // set rope length to 10m at 3m/s</sqf>
<sqf>ropeUnwind [ropes heli1 select 0, 3, -5, true]; // decrease rope length by 5m at 3m/s</sqf>
name: ropeUnwind

Item.desc: animation speed in m/s with which to lengthen or shorten the rope, in range 0.01..20
Item.name: speed

Item.desc: the amount of length change in meters, in range: 0.1..100
Item.name: length

Item.desc: (Optional) [[true]] will add or subtract given length from current rope length, [[false]] will resize the rope to the given length
Item.name: relative
